title: Sauvic Plastic Coated Dish Rack, Grey, Large

features: Material: steel with anticorrosive plastic coating
This coating offers a long term protection to stress craking and peeling coating, the inclemency of the weather and other airborne pollutants
Dish rack in 2 levels, with capacity for 18 dishes
